items.name: InsureIQ-Claim-Risk-Prediction
items.description: An end-to-end machine learning framework designed to predict high-imbalance (~3.64%) rare-event insurance claims. This repository implements a robust, leak-free 14-phase production pipeline—ranging from custom tracking of missing feature signatures (-1 encodings) to building an optimized 9-model heterogeneous benchmark.

items.name: w5-football-prediction
items.description: ⚽ Predict football match outcomes using the W-5 Multi-Agent AI Consensus Framework, achieving high accuracy with a blend of AI and machine learning techniques.

items.description: An evaluation framework for machine learning models simulating high-throughput materials discovery.

items.description: Machine Learning-based framework for automated UI usability classification using visual feature extraction and Random Forest, developed as an M.Tech Mini Project.

items.name: Orcalib
items.description: Orca: A lightweight, progressive, and modular Machine Learning framework written in Rust with Python bindings.

items.name: Premature-Labor-Risk-through-Cervical-Ultrasound-Imaging-in-Weeks-20-24
items.description: Multimodal machine-learning framework for predicting preterm birth risk using transvaginal ultrasound (TVUS) images and maternal clinical data. Features a MATLAB pipeline for normalized ROI extraction and an early-fusion deep learning network (EfficientNetB0 + MLP) optimized to maximize clinical sensitivity.

items.name: vnpy-Machine-Learning
items.description: vnpy-Machine-Learning: integrates machine-learning models with the vn.py quantitative-trading framework for AI-driven, data-driven algorithmic trading and backtesting in Python.

items.description: Enterprise-grade machine learning framework for credit card fraud detection, integrating statistical data preparation, class imbalance mitigation, hyperparameter optimization, business-driven model selection, independent model validation, financial impact analysis, and interactive executive reporting.

items.name: Unified-Mentor
items.description: This project presents the development of an Artificial Intelligence (AI) and machine learning-driven market intelligence framework integrated into Parcl Co. Limited, a decentralized real estate protocol on the Solana blockchain that enables fractionalized, synthetic exposure to global property markets.

items.name: Crack-Detection
items.description: InfraMetrics AI is an edge-deployable, multi-modal software framework designed to revolutionize Structural Health Monitoring (SHM). It bridges the gap between purely data-driven Machine Learning and physics-based civil engineering to create a real-time Physics-Informed Digital Twin of infrastructure (like bridges, buildings, and retaining walls).

items.name: ETD-XAI
items.description: ETD-XAI_code is a modular EEG-based machine learning and explainable AI framework for tic disorder classification and severity prediction, integrating statistical analysis, model evaluation, feature selection, and SHAP-based interpretability to enable reproducible and clinically interpretable multidomain EEG analysis.

items.name: pfund
items.description: An All-in-One Algo-Trading Framework: Backtest -> Train -> Trade -> Monitor. Machine / Deep Learning Ready. Supports All Trading: TradFi+CeFi+DeFi. Code Once, Trade Anywhere.

items.name: REFLEX
items.description: REFLEX: a machine learning framework for reflexive markets, where the data distribution depends on the model. We solve for a fixed-point equilibrium between a dealer market-making policy and the OTC bond market it shapes.

items.name: zerfoo
items.description: Pure Go machine learning framework. Train, run, and serve ML models with go build. Zero CGo.

This application was developed in Mathematica V13.

items.name: Phishing-Website-Detection-Using-Optimised-Machine-Learning-And-Deep-Learning
items.description: This project develops an enhanced phishing detection framework using a novel hybrid CNN + XGBoost architecture. It employs a Hybrid Ensemble Feature Selection (HEFS) methodology and compares tuned models such as Random Forest, XGBoost, CNN, and TCN via meta-learning layers to provide a robust solution for identifying malicious URLs.
